---
title: "Metabolomics Analysis Draft Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
    code-tools: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
params:
  project_id: null
  batch_id: null
  context_file: null
  report_title: null
  report_subtitle: null
---

```{python}
#| label: report-params
#| parameters: true

from pathlib import Path
import yaml

params = locals().get("params", {})

answers = {}
answers_path = Path("../.copier-answers.yml")
if answers_path.exists():
    try:
        answers = yaml.safe_load(answers_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) or {}
    except Exception:  # pragma: no cover - best effort fallback
        answers = {}

project_id = (
    params.get("project_id")
    or answers.get("recorded_mapp_project")
    or answers.get("mapp_project")
)
batch_id = (
    params.get("batch_id")
    or answers.get("recorded_mapp_batch")
    or answers.get("mapp_batch")
)

context_file = params.get("context_file")
if not context_file and project_id and batch_id:
    context_file = f"../docs/{project_id}/{batch_id}/report/context.yml"

report_title = params.get("report_title")
report_subtitle = params.get("report_subtitle")
```

```{python}
from __future__ import annotations

import datetime as dt
import pathlib

import yaml
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

context_path = pathlib.Path(context_file) if context_file else None
context = {}
context_loaded = False
if context_path and context_path.exists():
    with context_path.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as fp:
        context = yaml.safe_load(fp) or {}
    context_loaded = True
else:
    context = {}
    context_loaded = False

if not report_title:
    title_parts = [part for part in (project_id, batch_id) if part]
    report_title_value = " · ".join(title_parts) if title_parts else "Metabolomics Analysis Draft Report"
else:
    report_title_value = report_title

report_subtitle_value = report_subtitle
report_generated_at = (
    dt.datetime.now(dt.timezone.utc)
    .replace(microsecond=0)
    .isoformat()
    .replace("+00:00", "Z")
)

project_info = context.get("project", {})
project_info.setdefault("id", project_id)
project_info.setdefault("batch_id", batch_id)
context["project"] = project_info


def emit_markdown(text: str) -> None:
    """Render Markdown content in the notebook output."""
    if not text:
        return
    display(Markdown(text))


site_config = context.get("site") or {}
site_base_url = site_config.get("base_url")
report_dir = context_path.parent if context_path else None
if report_dir:
    report_dir = report_dir.resolve()
batch_dir = report_dir.parent if report_dir else None
project_dir_path = batch_dir.parent if batch_dir else None
docs_root = project_dir_path.parent if project_dir_path else None


def to_site_url(rel_path: str | pathlib.Path | None) -> str | None:
    if not rel_path:
        return None
    rel_str = str(rel_path)
    url = rel_str
    if site_base_url and report_dir and docs_root:
        target = (report_dir / rel_str).resolve()
        try:
            rel_docs = target.relative_to(docs_root)
            url = site_base_url.rstrip("/") + "/" + rel_docs.as_posix()
        except ValueError:
            url = rel_str
    return url


def link_markup(rel_path: str | pathlib.Path | None, label: str | None = None) -> str | None:
    if not rel_path:
        return None
    rel_str = str(rel_path)
    url = to_site_url(rel_str) or rel_str
    text = label or rel_str
    return f"[{text}]({url})"


def link_label(rel_path: str | pathlib.Path | None, label: str | None = None) -> str:
    markup = link_markup(rel_path, label)
    if markup:
        return markup
    return label or (str(rel_path) if rel_path is not None else "")
```

```{python}
emit_markdown(f"# {report_title_value}")
if report_subtitle_value:
    emit_markdown(f"_{report_subtitle_value}_")
```

{{< include templates/overview.qmd >}}

{{< include templates/metadata.qmd >}}

{{< include templates/mzmine.qmd >}}

{{< include templates/sirius.qmd >}}

{{< include templates/stats.qmd >}}

{{< include templates/next_steps.qmd >}}
